owner_operator_stated: Locally owned and operated by two endodontists, Dr. Nisha Mehta and Dr. Tam Trinh
notes: Vendor hint (Northbrooksmiles.Com) was wrong. Corroborated by exact street address match (707 Lake Cook Rd #300, Deerfield, IL 60015); listed site phone (847) 920-6382 differs from record's (847) 412-0600, but address alone is sufficient corroboration per rules. Single-location independent endodontic specialty practice (not GP), not part of a multi-location group or DSO. No careers page found.

owner_operator_stated: Michael A. Aburano, DDS - practice is named for him and site content centers on his solo practice
notes: Corroborated by exact address (400 Lake Cook Rd Ste 200A/#115, Deerfield, IL 60015) AND exact phone (847) 945-8565 match. Vendor hint (Deerfielddentalcare.Com) was wrong/unrelated. Independent multi-location practice: Dr. Aburano also runs a second office at 1640 N Wells St, Old Town Chicago - not a DSO. The /staff page also lists 'Dr. John Smith' and 'Dr. Sarah Green' with generic stock-template bios (e.g. 'University of Minnesota 1990... practiced in Minneapolis for ten years') that read as unedited website-builder placeholder content, not real staff of this practice; excluded from the roster as unverifiable. No careers page found.

owner_operator_stated: 711 Orchard St #1, Deerfield is currently Kauffman Family Dentistry, owned/operated by Dr. Ashley Kauffman; the site states the office was formerly 'Orchard Dental,' run by Dr. Alfonso LaPelusa for 37 years, and that Kauffman 'continues that tradition.' No mention of Dr. Craig Lehtman (the record's named entity) anywhere on the site or in any directory found for this address.
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: the record names 'Lehtman, Craig D DDS' at 711 Orchard St, phone (847) 254-6244, but the address is currently occupied by Kauffman Family Dentistry (formerly Orchard Dental / Dr. Alfonso LaPelusa), phone (847) 945-5454 - a different name/owner, and neither of the site's phone numbers (current or predecessor) matches the record's phone. Web search for Dr. Lehtman at this address only surfaces third-party directory aggregator listings (Yelp, DentalPlans, Yellow Pages, Superpages, etc.), never an owned/operated website; a separate search shows Dr. Craig Lehtman also has (or had) offices in Evanston, IL (708 Church St, 500 Davis St), suggesting he may have relocated away from the Deerfield address. Vendor hint (Kauffmanfamilydentistry.Com) correctly points to the CURRENT occupant of the address, but that occupant is not the named record entity.

public_practice_name: North Shore Oral Surgery and Dental Implant Center
owner_operator_stated: Record's exact phone (847) 945-6700 is confirmed via web search as belonging to North Shore Oral Surgery and Dental Implant Center, 720 Osterman Ave Suite 102, Deerfield - an oral-and-maxillofacial-surgery specialist practice led by Dr. Benjamin A. LoGiudice, DDS - not the general-dentistry LTD named in the record.
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT found via phone-number search (the rule-recommended disambiguator): record's phone (847) 945-6700 currently rings to North Shore Oral Surgery and Dental Implant Center (Dr. Benjamin A. LoGiudice, oral surgery specialist), Suite 102 of the 720 Osterman Ave building - not 'Louis P. Alonzi D.D.S. LTD.' Separately, directory listings (dentistreg.com, healthgrades.com) tie the 'Louis P Alonzi DDS Ltd' legal entity name to a multi-provider general-dentistry group (Drs. Jerrold Hoppe, Michael Hoppe, Rebecca Wilson, Ashley Tsiao and others) publicly branded 'Hoppe Family Dental,' Suite 305 of the SAME building, serving Deerfield since 1983 - but Hoppe Family Dental's own listed phone is (847) 945-1600, which does NOT match the record's phone either, so that link could not be phone-corroborated (WebFetch to hoppefamilydental.com returned 403 Forbidden, so it could not be directly verified). The record's provider_count=7 is far more consistent with the 7-ish-provider Hoppe group than with a solo oral surgeon, so 'Louis P Alonzi DDS Ltd' most likely legally underlies Hoppe Family Dental, but this is circumstantial, not corroborated by address+phone rules. Vendor hint (Jvortho.Com, an orthodontist site) was unrelated/wrong.

owner_operator_stated: Founded 1956 by Dr. William J. Burns (d. 2016); now run by his sons Dr. Michael F. Burns and Dr. William F. Burns and his grandson Dr. William M. Burns
notes: Vendor hint (Dentistdeerfieldil.Com) was correct. Corroborated by exact address (405 Lake Cook Rd #208, Deerfield, IL 60015) AND exact phone (847) 291-0888 match. Single-location independent family practice, three-generation family ownership; no DSO affiliation found. No careers page found on the site.

owner_operator_stated: Founded by Dr. Michael J. Partridge (1983 UIC grad); practiced 35+ years then retired in 2018. Son Dr. Andrew Partridge (2014 Marquette grad, joined 2014) is the current active provider.
notes: Vendor hint (Partridgedental.Com) was correct. Corroborated by exact address (690 1st Ave, Des Plaines, IL 60016) AND exact phone (847) 635-6268 match. Single-location independent family practice, father-to-son succession (founder Michael retired 2018, son Andrew now the active/current dentist); no DSO affiliation found.
